titles.title: Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus Just to take Him at His Word, Just to rest upon His promise Just to know' Thus saith the Lord. '

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus how I trust Him How I've proved Him o'er and o'er, Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus Oh for the grace to trust Him more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes tis sweet to trust in Jesus Just from sin and self to cease, Just from Jesus sweetly taking Life and rest and joy and peace.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm so glad I've learned to trust Him Precious Jesus, Saviour, Friend, And I know that Thou art with me Will be with me to the end.
